content.full_text:
August 12, 1992

Scott Hallebran
Fair Political Practices Commission
Legal Division
428 J Street, Ste. 600
Sacramento, CA 95804

Dear Mr. Hallebran:

Per our conversation, I am writing to you to get a formal opinion to confirm that there is no conflict of interest in my accepting a teaching internship with the Los Rios Community College District. The teaching internship will pay me a $1,000 stipend for the semester.

Currently, I handle higher education, among other issues for Speaker Willie L. Brown.

Please call me at 445-8077 if you have any questions.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

Marlene Garcia

State Capital
Room 219
